title: This OpenSource Repo will 10X Your Hermes Agent
summary: Agent Reach is an open source repo that augments Hermes agents with web research capabilities across YouTube, LinkedIn, Reddit, X, and GitHub, plus data enrichment and contact verification via Clay integration. The system uses intelligent routing and multi-source research to reduce token usage while enabling automated lead discovery.
writeup: The video introduces Agent Reach, an open source repo that extends Hermes agents with web research across YouTube, LinkedIn, Reddit, X, and GitHub, plus data enrichment and contact verification through Clay integration. It matters because the system applies intelligent routing and multi-source research to cut token usage while supporting automated lead discovery. Key takeaways: the repo adds multi-platform research and enrichment to Hermes agents, and smart routing reduces token consumption during that research.
